# kubefu_k8s_networking_k8s_io_service_cidr_v1beta1 (Data Source)

ServiceCIDR defines a range of IP addresses using CIDR format (e.g. 192.168.0.0/24 or 2001:db2::/64). This range is used to allocate ClusterIPs to Service objects.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `metadata` (Map of String) Standard object's metadata. More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#metadata
- `spec` (Map of String) spec is the desired state of the ServiceCIDR. More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#spec-and-status
- `status` (Map of String) status represents the current state of the ServiceCIDR. More info: https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/devel/sig-architecture/api-conventions.md#spec-and-status
